description: Beispiel-Stahl GmbH exists in Hagen SAP as L-4711, in Asheville SAP as V-90021, and in Poggibonsi SAP as F-3300. All share USt-IdNr DE111111111. Names and addresses match modulo whitespace and casing. No real disagreements — should NOT require human reconciliation.
Same vendor DE333333333 has 30-day payment terms in Hagen SAP and 45-day in Poggibonsi SAP. Should flag payment_terms_days as a disagreement.
Vendor DE444444444 has different IBANs in Asheville and Valladolid — almost certainly a master-data error or a recent change not yet propagated. High-risk: payments could go to the wrong account.
